en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Nicaraguan Social Security documentation in the Nicaragua Social Security INSS Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Nicaragua Social Security INSS Registration Certificate

In Nicaragua, companies must comply with the General Regulations of the INSS, as reformed by Decreto No. 975 and upheld by the Nicaraguan Social Security Institute (INSS).\n\nThe Registration Certificate is issued by INSS upon registration as an employer. Employers can obtain a copy of their registration certificate either in person at INSS offices or through the official INSS online services portal..
Please upload your company’s valid Registration Certificate to confirm compliance with Nicaraguan Social Security requirements.
